Terms of Service

Updated: January 1, 2026

Effective: January 1, 2026

Confirmation and acceptance of terms of service

In order to meet your needs for continuous monthly subscription products and automatic renewal deductions, this application provider launches continuous monthly subscription services. For related services, please pay attention to this agreement. If you need to purchase, please click the "continuous monthly subscription" option to purchase such products. This agreement constitutes a prerequisite for your use of this continuous monthly subscription service provided by this application. Unless you accept the terms of this agreement, you are not entitled to use this service. Your choice to use this service will be deemed as agreeing to be bound by this agreement. When you use the continuous monthly service, your use will be considered as its agreement with the relevant terms of the single service and various announcements issued by the application provider in the single service.

Ownership and use rights

The ownership of all network services involved in the continuous monthly service and the related intellectual property rights are owned by the application provider according to law, and are protected by the laws of USA and international conventions according to law. You do not automatically obtain the aforementioned One or all rights. Moreover, the application provider can modify any or all of the terms of this service agreement or adjust the continuous monthly service under the legal conditions. For the above amendments or adjustments, the application will make an announcement on the website and self-announcement. Effective 7 days after the date. The provider of this application strongly recommends that you pay regular attention to this clause. When you consider that the adjustments under this agreement are unacceptable, please terminate the use of this continuous monthly service provided by this application provider in a timely manner.

Continuous monthly service type and scope of service content

This application provides continuous monthly service and continuous annual service, and will continuously add new continuous service according to user needs. By using the continuous monthly service, you can regularly obtain the following service providers of this application, including Unlimited use of all feature;

Remove all ads;

Unless otherwise notified by the application provider, the validity period of the service provided by the application provider mentioned above is calculated based on natural days.

Service Description

4.1 This service is based on your need for automatic renewal. On the premise that you have activated the service, to prevent you from inadvertent or other reasons leading to the loss of timely renewal and loss, you will authorize this application to be available on your When the current membership period of this application is about to expire, the next billing cycle fee will be deducted from the balance of the member's own recharge account, the third-party payment account tied to the member account, bank card, and communication account (hereinafter collectively referred to as "account").

4.2 Automatic renewal specifically means that based on the premise of 4.1, this application uses the account described above to charge you for the monthly monthly product charge for the next billing cycle. You need to ensure that the application can successfully debit the account from the above account, as the above account can Failure to renew your account due to insufficient debit balance will be your responsibility.

4.3 If there is an error in the deduction process, this application and you should cooperate closely to find out the reasons and bear the losses caused by their own faults; if the two parties have losses caused by unequal faults, the two parties shall bear the corresponding liabilities according to the degree of fault; If the two parties are jointly responsible, the two parties shall share responsibility.

4.4 The services provided by this application to you are limited to use in this application. Any payment outside this application or any act of separating the service content provided by this application from this application platform by malicious means such as malicious cracking does not belong to The service agreed in this agreement. All legal consequences arising therefrom are the responsibility of the actor, and the application provider will hold the actor's legal responsibility according to law.

Continuous monthly subscription service

For the selected payment channel, you are obliged to ensure that you regularly pay attention and ensure that there is sufficient balance under the account of the payment method to meet the application of continuous monthly service. If the foregoing reasons are flawed (including but not limited to: insufficient balance, insufficient balance to meet the user's choice of multiple consecutive monthly subscription services), and the application cannot meet the continuous monthly subscription service, the application provider has the right to suspend the Related value-added services.

Validity period of continuous monthly service

Unless otherwise specified by the application provider, the continuous monthly subscription service you receive will be valid for a long period of time. The application provider will charge you the corresponding service fee before the service period of the application provider you have selected expires. It is up to you to choose whether to cancel the service. If you choose not to cancel, you are deemed to agree to the application to make irregular payment attempts in accordance with this agreement. Once the payment is successful, the application will open the next billing cycle for you. Continuous monthly service. If the price of the monthly service of this application is adjusted before / after automatic renewal, the current effective price shall prevail. The application provider specially reminds you that when you choose to use the continuous monthly service, you will entrust the application provider to pay in your default payment method through the continuous monthly service. The application provider will treat you as an option to subscribe to this application. Party's related paid services. Therefore, the application provider will not refund the fees you paid in any way.

Unsubscribe for continuous monthly service

7.1 You can choose to unsubscribe from this service

7.2 Cancellation process, that is, steps to close the continuous monthly service:

If you need to cancel the renewal, please manually turn off the renewal function in iTunes / Apple ID settings management 24 hours before the current subscription expires. The instruction that you have entrusted to this application for continuous monthly deduction before you choose to terminate this service is still valid, and this application will not refund the fees deducted based on this instruction.

Privacy Policy

For you to better experience this service, your corresponding personal information may be collected. However, this application attaches great importance to the protection of personal information of users. For detailed privacy policy, please read the privacy policy of this application. If you do not agree, please do not open or stop using this service.

Validity period and termination of the agreement

This agreement takes effect after you choose to accept or use the service, and terminates when you terminate the service.

Dispute resolution and law application

This application and you shall resolve the disputes during the implementation of this agreement through friendly negotiation. If the dispute cannot be resolved through negotiation, either party has the right to submit the dispute to the people's court where the defendant is located for settlement. The interpretation, validity and implementation of this agreement shall be governed by the laws of USA.
